name: Peach Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Butter or margarine (cut into pieces)
1 and 1/4 cups Peaches (peeled, cut into 1-inch chunks - about 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. To make the streusel topping, combine oats, flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a medium bowl. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in pecans.
4. In another medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. In a mixer bowl, beat softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla. Alternately add dry ingredients (beginning and ending with dry ingredients) to the butter mixture; beat just until combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle half of the streusel topping evenly over it.
7. Arrange peaches on top of the batter, then sprinkle remaining streusel over the peaches.
8. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 30 minutes before serving. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Serve warm or at room temperature. Makes 8 servings.
